SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TIFFANY OCON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JOEL MARTINEZ AND DAVID MARTINEZ ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DAVID WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DAVID MARTINEZ WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM TO HEAR THE MATTER TODAY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
